mechanism_narrative: A 5-month growth acceleration in the US GDP signals an expansion in aggregate demand that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth acceleration fails to translate into positive forward returns in > 50% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the industrial production index signals a supply-side shock that compresses corporate profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO decline fails to translate into negative forward returns in > 60% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Unemployment rate rise fails to translate into positive forward returns in > 70% of instances over any 4-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month growth acceleration in the US GDP and a 1-month rise in the housing starts signal an expansion in aggregate demand that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth acceleration and housing starts rise fail to translate into positive forward returns in > 55% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the industrial production index and a 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signal a supply-side shock that compresses corporate profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 103 and UNRATE rises above 4.5%
failure_condition: INDPRO decline and unemployment rate rise fail to translate into negative forward returns in > 65% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month growth acceleration in the US GDP and a 2-month rise in the retail sales signal an expansion in aggregate demand that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth acceleration and retail sales rise fail to translate into positive forward returns in > 50% of instances over any 2-year rolling window.
